name: Springer Eubank
message: A locally owned & operated company serving the Cape Fear Region.Our professionally trained staff is always ready to help you with your fuel needs.Springer Eubank Supplies Fuel to Southeastern North CarolinaLocated just off the Cape Fear River near the entrance to the state shipyards in Wilmington, Springer Eubank provides fuel delivery to the southeastern NC region throughout New Hanover and Pender Counties, along with deliveries to the Jacksonville area in North Carolina. springeroil.com
